lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: Salutations traveller! It is unusual for one of the creatures called 'humans' to visit this plane. How can I assist you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just looking around, thanks.

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: I hope the beauty of my world brings you great joy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: My name, in your language, would be Bubrezankaldargarez'jk, but you can just call me Bub. This small plane is my home, here I study and ponder the mysteries of existence.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mysteries of existence, eh? Like what?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for a Star Flower.

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: Then you've come to the right place. Star Flower, which is much prized for its magical properties, only grows on this plane. It has a very short life-span; plants grow, flower and die in the space of minutes! If you search

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: around you might find some growing somewhere.

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: Where do flies go at night?

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: Have you ever flicked through a dictionary and afterwards felt really depressed by how much you don't know?

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: Do other birds speak pigeon pidgin?

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: Political philosophy is an oxymoron.

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: Why are yawns contagious?

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: Do sick days include when you're sick of work?

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: To be is to be the value of a variable.

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: How do you know when you've run out of invisible ink?

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: Where does a snake's tail begin?

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: How long do fish wait to swim after they eat?

lines.speaker: Cosmic Being
lines.text: If you're halfway from here to there, which is which?
